name: Samsung #BeFearless Fear of Public Speaking – Personal Life

reviews.review_description: It tells me that the app is terminated...galaxy s6
Now I can't proceed to develop the social skills necessary to even have a personal life. I'm stuck with Ms. Kitty.

Not cool
This looks like a worthwhile app however it doesn't work very disappointing

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are having problems with our app.

reviews.review_description: It is so nice with levels and topics selection as well as recording and eye contact with virtual audience. I can better practice for public speaking. Really enjoyed singing with music selection.

reviews.review_title: Great title . There is room for improve
reviews.review_description:
Fear of public speaking is extremely common. Even if you don't have a fear, it's very helpful to have a playground to practice. This is what this app provides.

Some suggestions can you paragraph

Use the heart rate sensor on S7 Edge to take the heart rate in the beginning of the session or during the session. Since this is done when the customer is seated, it's easier to do then buying a separate SmartWatch with heart rate sensor.

It would be great if instead of the animated drum figures there were video segments of real people. But it doesn't really make a lot of difference , the app is very useful.

Huge thank you to the developers.
You cannot launch this app anymore, only receive a message that it has been discontinued
